vision_description: Fragment of a large ornamental blackletter/gothic initial letter with thick, decorative curved strokes typical of medieval manuscript illuminations or early woodcut type. The visible portion shows curving black forms on a white background, possibly part of a letter such as U, C, or G rendered in Fraktur/blackletter style.

Fragment of a large ornamental blackletter/gothic initial letter with thick, decorative curved strokes typical of medieval manuscript illuminations or early woodcut type. The visible portion shows curving black forms on a white background, possibly part of a letter such as U, C, or G rendered in Fraktur/blackletter style.

A cadastral land-parcel diagram showing a quadrilateral (parallelogram-shaped) plot outlined with solid black borders, containing the printed number '651' in its center. A dashed line runs along the left edge (indicating an undefined or road boundary), and the right edge abuts another parcel labeled '2'. This is a typical element of a German Flurkarte (land registry map) or similar parcel plan.
